positive: A cozy, storybook illustration of a tiny fox curled up asleep in a patch of glowing mushrooms in an enchanted forest clearing. Soft watercolor wash style, pastel palette of sage green, dusty rose, and cream. Depth of field, whimsical, warm lighting, highly detailed nature scene.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, digital painting, cyberpunk, sharp edges
